channel.title: Causal AI weekly digest
channel.description: Weekly roundup of new research and engineering posts on causal inference, causal ML, causal language models, and online experimentation.

item.title: Causal AI weekly digest — 2026-W29
item.description: 1. Analogical Deep Research: Retrieving and Integrating Historical Analogies for Foresight Analysis — Causal LMs · score 100 · arXiv cs.LG · Yongqiang Chen, Guangyi Chen, Yuewen Sun, Kun Zhang 2. Causal Inference under Interference through Designed Markets ∗ — Experimentation · score 98 · Semantic Scholar: Susan Athey causal · †. EvanMunro, Claudia Allende-Santa, Allende-Santa Cruz, Susan Athey et al. (11 authors) 3. Profits and Social Impacts: Complements vs. Tradeoffs for Lenders in Three Countries — Other · score 90 · Semantic Scholar: Susan Athey causal · Susan Athey, Bruno Fava, D. Karlan, Adam Osman et al. (5 authors) 4. Epistemic Stance Flexibility Probing: Measuring Prompt-Conditioned Register Shift in Large Language Models — Causal LMs · score 60 · arXiv cs.CL · Binwen Liu, Yilin Ren 5. Traffic-Aware Randomized Smoothing for LLM-Based Network Intrusion Detection — Causal LMs · score 56 · arXiv cs.LG · Zhenpeng Li

Laber, Stefan Wager 4. item.title: Causal AI weekly digest — 2026-W27
item.description: 1. On Causal Discovery in the Presence of Deterministic Relations — Other · score 90 · Semantic Scholar: Kun Zhang causal discovery · Loka Li, Haoyue Dai, Hanin Al Ghothani, Biwei Huang et al. (9 authors) 2. Pessimism's Paradox: Conservative Offline Training Amplifies Reward Hacking During Online Adaptation in Reasoning Models — Uplift / HTE · score 56 · arXiv stat.ML · Subramanyam Sahoo, Aman Chadha, Vinija Jain, Divya Chaudhary 3. Towards Continual Motion-Language Agents: LoRA Variants for Incremental Motion Understanding and Generation — Causal LMs · score 56 · arXiv cs.LG · Bertram Taetz, Hugo Albuquerque Cosme da Silva, Gabriele Bleser-Taetz 4. A Stochastic--Geometric Theory of Scaling Laws in Grokking — Uplift / HTE · score 52 · arXiv stat.ML · Róisín Luo, Christian Gagné, Jonas Ngnawé, Ihsan Ullah et al. (5 authors) 5. Experience Augmented Policy Optimization for LLM Reasoning — Causal LMs · score 52 · arXiv cs.LG · Jinda Lu, Kexin Huang, Junkang Wu, Shuo Yang et al. (10 authors)
